backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, UserSettings, Experience) and query/update methods for experiences and user data, with authorization and blob storage mixins applied.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts stored user profiles and settings from the old two-value language enum (#german, #english) to the new ten-locale language variant on canister upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking three i18n-related features (translations, TranslationContext, and Settings language selector) to their implementation files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Dini.Verse', linking the favicon, and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the tree in ThemeProvider and TranslationProvider, and renders the Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccountsDis: Card component that prompts unauthenticated users to log in or sign up, with navigation buttons to the login and signup routes.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthButtons: Renders authentication action buttons (Log In, Sign Up, or Log Out) based on the current session state, navigating to appropriate routes on click.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireProf: A guard component that wraps protected content, showing a loading spinner or a login/signup prompt card if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/create/builder2d: Renders the 2D builder canvas with interactive drag-and-drop and corner-handle resizing for placed elements using mouse event listeners.
Provides a file input button that reads a selected image file as a data URL and adds it as a decal to the 2D builder.
Displays controls for the selected builder element to bring it forward, send it backward, or delete it from the canvas.
Shows a panel of sliders and inputs to edit the selected element's position, opacity, rotation, color, and dimensions in the 2D builder.
Manages saving, loading, exporting, importing, and deleting named canvas prop presets using the useBuilder2DProps hook, with dialog UIs for each action.
Renders buttons to add rectangle, circle, or triangle shapes to the 2D builder canvas.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Crea: Renders a follow/unfollow button for a creator's principal, handling authentication checks and self-follow prevention via social following hooks.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Expe: Displays an experience as a card with a thumbnail, title, description, and creator name, with a hover overlay play button that navigates to the experience page.
Renders a responsive grid of ExperienceCard components with skeleton loading placeholders and an empty-state message when no experiences are available.
Displays thumbs-up/thumbs-down rating buttons for an experience, requiring authentication and using the useRateExperience mutation to submit ratings.
frontend/src/components/experiences/InGa: Provides a fixed in-game menu button that opens dialogs for leaving, resetting the character (with confirmation), and accessing placeholder settings.
frontend/src/components/experiences/Publ: A dialog form for publishing a new experience, handling title, description, category, gameplay controls, and optional thumbnail upload with progress tracking via useCreateExperience.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app shell layout composing SiteHeader, LeftSidebar, a main content outlet, and SiteFooter.
frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChang: Displays a static informational banner notifying users that on-platform authentication is available and external login redirects are disabled.
frontend/src/components/layout/LeftSideb: Renders a hidden-on-mobile left navigation sidebar with links to Profile, Social, Inventory, Groups, and Settings using translated labels.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders the site footer with a copyright notice and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Sticky top header with logo, desktop navigation buttons, auth controls, and a collapsible mobile menu for all main routes.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileH: Displays a user profile card with avatar, display name, and action buttons for Discover and Publish Experience, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/social/Following: Displays a list of followed creators with avatar and display name, and provides an unfollow button for each using the social following hooks.
frontend/src/components/social/FriendsPa: Provides a friends management UI with user search, sending/accepting/declining friend requests, and unfriending, using social friends and user discovery hooks.
frontend/src/components/social/MessagesP: Implements a two-panel messaging UI where users can search for recipients, select a conversation, and send/view messages using social messaging hooks.
frontend/src/components/social/PartiesPa: Placeholder panel displaying a 'Party System Coming Soon' message for a future feature to join experiences with friends.
frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext: Provides a React context for i18n translations, resolving translation keys based on the user's language setting with English fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccountSettings.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user account settings including display name, avatar, visibility, language, and account deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2D.ts: Provides a React hook for managing a 2D canvas builder state, including adding/updating/deleting shapes and decals, z-index reordering, and canvas reset/load operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuilder2DProps.ts: Manages saving, loading, deleting, exporting, and importing named 2D builder prop configurations using localStorage for persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Thin wrapper around useSessionAuth that exposes the current user, authentication status, and loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useExperiences.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching experiences (all, by ID, by author, by category, trending, search) and stub mutations for creating and rating experiences against a backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity/status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for user profile and experience CRUD operations against the backend actor, with several mutations stubbed as not-yet-implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionAuth.ts: Implements session-token-based authentication with login, signup, and logout flows, temporarily using mock tokens while backend methods are pending implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFollowing.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for a creator following system (follow, unfollow, follower count, isFollowing) that all return stub values or throw 'coming soon' errors since the backend is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialFriends.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for a friends system (list friends, pending requests, send/respond to requests, unfriend) where all mutations throw 'not yet implemented' errors pending backend support.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialMessages.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for direct messaging (get messages, send message) with a local Message type definition; all operations return empty data or throw errors until the backend is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useSocialParties.ts: Single placeholder React Query hook for fetching the current party, always returning null with the query disabled until the backend party system is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Thin re-export hook that returns the translation context from TranslationContext.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDiscovery.ts: Placeholder React Query hook for searching users by term that always returns an empty array with the query disabled until backend session-based search is implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for fetching and updating user profiles (current user, any user, sign up) that all return null or throw errors until backend session auth is implemented.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines the English (and partially other) UI string translations for all app sections including nav, auth, home, discover, profile, social, and settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports the Outfit font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AvatarShop.tsx: Static placeholder page for the Avatar Shop displaying category cards (Clothing, Accessories, Premium, Animations) and a 'Coming Soon' message with a disabled browse button.
frontend/src/pages/Create.tsx: Create page presenting two navigation cards: one for a 2D Games/Experiences builder and one for UGC Accessories design, each routing to their respective builder pages.
Page component for the 2D Game Builder tool, composing a canvas, shape palette, layer controls, properties panel, decal uploader, and props panel using the useBuilder2D hook.
Placeholder page for the UGC Accessories Creator feature, displaying a 'Coming Soon' message with a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/DiniBucks.tsx: Page displaying the Dini Bucks virtual currency info, showing the user's balance if authenticated or prompting login/signup, alongside earn/spend/trade/premium feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/Discover.tsx: Discover page with search, category tabs, trending experiences, and a full experience grid, plus a publish dialog for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ExperienceDetails.tsx: Detail page for a single experience showing thumbnail, creator info, rating controls, follow button, and a simulated play/in-game menu flow.
frontend/src/pages/Groups.tsx: Placeholder Groups page that displays an empty state card prompting users to join groups.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page showing a personalized welcome card for authenticated users, a recommended experiences grid, and a friend activity sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Placeholder Inventory page displaying an empty state card directing users to the Avatar Shop.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component with username/password form that calls useSessionAuth's login method and navigates to home on success, displaying validation and API errors.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Profile page that requires authentication, displays the current user's avatar, display name, username, and buttons to edit profile or navigate to settings.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing authenticated users to update display name, avatar, visibility, gender, language, and theme, with account deletion support via various mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up page with a form collecting username, display name, password, and confirmation, validating inputs and calling useSessionAuth's signup method before redirecting home.
frontend/src/pages/Social.tsx: Social page with tabbed panels for Friends, Messages, Parties, and Following; redirects unauthenticated users to an AccountsDisabledNotice.
frontend/src/utils/formatError.ts: Utility function that normalizes any thrown value (Error, string, or object) into a human-readable English error message string.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides get, set, and clear helpers for persisting a session token string in localStorage under a fixed key.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a hash-param removal utility.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch CSS variables, extended typography, container queries, animation plugins, and accordion keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a multi-language website supporting 10 locales, listing existing implemented features, known issues (TranslationProvider context error), and pending action requests for backend/frontend language support updates.
